nasb.text: ‘Now if a man has a seminal emission, he shall bathe all his body in water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: “If a man has an emission of semen, he shall bathe his whole body in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: “人若是遺精，就要用水把全身洗淨，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: “男人若遗精，便不洁净，必须沐浴全身，等到傍晚才能洁净。
